cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those position swaps. So, initially, the positions are: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Cheerleader - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So after this, Dave becomes the Right Midfielder (since Bob was there) and Bob becomes the Cheerleader (since Dave was there). Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Right Midfielder - Eve: Goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So now, Dave moves to Goalkeeper (Eve's position) and Eve becomes the Right Midfielder (Dave's current position before swap). So now: After second swap: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Right Midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was Right Winger and Bob is Cheerleader. After swapping: After third swap: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Right Midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is Goalkeeper and Claire is Left Winger. After swapping: After fourth swap: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Goalkeeper - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Right Midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions again. Dave is Left Winger and Eve is Right Midfielder. After swapping: After fifth swap: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Goalkeeper - Dave: Right Midfielder - Eve: Left Winger So, the question is asking where Bob is at the end.
